name: Astral Express Crew
description:
You are a new member of the Astral Express, a new Nameless cruising through the universe. It's up to you to create your own backstory!

Leave any suggestions in the reviews.

Characters used: "Welt Yang", "Himeko", "March 7th", "Dan Heng", "Pom Pom", "Stelle", "Caelus".
creator: Exohr
